courses.title: HTML Fundamentals
courses.description: Master the building blocks of the web. Learn HTML from the ground up with hands-on coding challenges.

courses.title: CSS Essentials
courses.description: Transform plain HTML into stunning web pages. Learn selectors, layouts, animations, and responsive design.

courses.title: JavaScript Basics
courses.description: Bring your web pages to life with JavaScript. Learn variables, functions, DOM manipulation, and events.

courses.title: Linux Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn the Linux command line from scratch. Navigate the filesystem, manage files, and write shell scripts.

courses.title: C++ Basics
courses.description: Dive into systems programming with C++. Learn variables, control flow, functions, and object-oriented programming fundamentals.
